children.text: preempt or supersede any other program relating to soybean promotion, research, consumer information, or industry information organized and operated under the laws of the United States or any State; or
authorize the withholding of any information from Congress.

children.heading: Referenda on qualified State soybean boards
children.label: 1 Referenda on qualified State soybean boards
A
children.text: during the period beginning on the date an order is issued under and ending 18 months after the referendum on such order is conducted under ; orsection 6303 of this titlesection 6305(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: if such order is approved under the referendum conducted under by a majority of producers voting in such State, such State law shall be suspended for an additional 36 months.section 6305(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a State referendum concerning the approval of modifications to a State soybean promotion program that does not involve termination of the qualified State soybean board or State soybean assessment; and

children.label: B
children.text: any State referendum regarding a State soybean promotion program that is originated by soybean producers.

children.heading: Assessments collected by qualified State soybean boards
children.label: 3 Assessments collected by qualified State soybean boards
children.text: To ensure adequate funding of the operations of qualified State soybean boards under this chapter, whenever an order is in effect under this chapter, no State law or regulation that limits the rate of assessment that the qualified State soybean board in that State may collect from producers on soybeans produced in such State, or that has the effect of limiting such rate, may be applied to prohibit such State board from collecting, and expending for authorized purposes, assessments from producers of up to the full amount of the credit authorized for producer contributions to qualified State soybean boards under section 6304()(4) of this title.l

children.heading: Amendments to orders
children.label: c Amendments to orders
children.text: The provisions of this chapter applicable to orders shall be applicable to amendments to orders.
